ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is distributed */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  "num_features" INTEGER /* Number of features in the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., NaiveBayes, RandomForest, IBk) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Specific algorithm used in the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training release */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for this release */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the training release */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the training release */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the training release was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the training release was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training release used for evaluation */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model on this release */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model on this release */,
  "auc" REAL /* AUC (Area Under the ROC Curve) of the model on this release */,
  "kappa" REAL /* Kappa score of the model on this release */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the evaluation was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the evaluation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the evaluation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES training_releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being configured */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration parameter */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training release this data belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the training data */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the training data in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the training data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the training data was last updated */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the training data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., precision, recall, AUC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluation_metrics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model evaluation metric */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model evaluation */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric for this model evaluation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric value was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES evaluation_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_metrics_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model evaluation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model evaluation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the evaluation */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used to access the evaluation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES model_evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the model version */,
  "version_note" TEXT /* Note or description of the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_release_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training release version */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training release being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the training release version */,
  "version_note" TEXT /* Note or description of the training release version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the training release version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the training release version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_release_versions_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES training_releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the dataset version */,
  "version_note" TEXT /* Note or description of the dataset version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dataset version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
